title: EventEnvelope
description: Common envelope wrapping all SafeGAI domain events. Every event must include these fields.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of the envelope schema

correlationId.description: Correlation ID linking related events in a causal chain

deviceId.description: Source device identifier (camera, I/O module, etc.)

zoneId.description: Logical zone identifier within the site

observedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event was observed at source

receivedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the gateway received the event

sequenceNo.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number per source

source.description: Logical source component name (e.g. camera-adapter, zone-engine)

quality.description: Data quality indicator for the event payload
